advancements.clockware.get_any_clockware: Get your first clockware, now find a ripperdoc for installation!
Use a Golem Arm to make a handcrank fly
gui.clockware.ripperdoc.part.head: Head
item.clockware.arm.projectile_launcher.t: Hold ammo and _right-click_ the launcher item _slot_.
With the clockware _installed_, hold ammo in the _opposite_ hand, _sneak_, and _hold_ _right-click_.
Gives the user the ability to _shoot_ _projectiles_ from their wrist, including _arrows_, _eggs_, _snowballs_ and _rockets_.
With an empty hand, hold _left-click_ (not at a block) for half a second to _extend_/_retract_ the blade.
Deploys a hidden _blade_ from the wrist while _empty-handed_, the blade _ignores armor_.
item.clockware.body.buoyancy_chamber.too: Installs twin _air_ _sacs_ on the back, _regulating_ descent to reduce _fall_ _damage_, slow _sinking_ in _water_, and _enhance_ _elytra_ _acceleration_ and _speed_.
item.clockware.body.clockwork_heart.tool: Accelerates the user's _metabolism_, pumping blood _faster_ to boost _natural_ _regeneration_ gained from _food_.
item.clockware.body.obsidian_core.toolti: Reinforces the user's _bones_ with an internal _obsidian_ framework, greatly enhancing _defense_ and _knockback_ _resistance_ at the cost of _speed_.
Stabilizes the user's _temperature_ in harsh conditions, _reducing_ _slightly_ _fire_ and _freezing_ damage.
Stabilizes the user's _temperature_ in harsh conditions, _reducing_ _greatly_ _fire_ and _freezing_ damage while _slightly_ _reducing_ _lava_ burn effects.
Stabilizes the user's _temperature_ in harsh conditions, _negating_ _fire_ and _freezing_ damage while _greatly_ _reducing_ _lava_ burn effects.
item.clockware.head.arachnid_optics.tool: Enhances the user's _vision_, granting better _eyesight_ and extra _critical damage_.
item.clockware.head.biopurifier_0.toolti: Integrates a _biochemical filter_ into the user's _jaw_, purifying ingested _food_ from _harmful_ _effects_.
item.clockware.head.biopurifier_1.toolti: Integrates a _biochemical filter_ into the user's _jaw_, granting immunity to _effects_ from _food_, as well as from _drinkable_ and _splash_ _potions_.
item.clockware.head.biopurifier_2.toolti: Integrates a _biochemical filter_ into the user's _jaw_, neutralizing toxins from _food_ and nearly all forms of _potions_ (except _arrows_). Neutralizes _dragon's_ _breath_.
item.clockware.head.optical_calibrator_0: Equips the user with an _enhanced eye_, removing _projectile_ _inaccuracy_.
item.clockware.head.optical_calibrator_1: Equips the user with an _enhanced eye_, removing _projectile_ _inaccuracy_ and granting immunity to _vision-distorting_ effects like _darkness_ and _nausea_.
item.clockware.head.optical_calibrator_2: Equips the user with an _enhanced eye_, removing _projectile_ _inaccuracy_, granting immunity to _vision-distorting_ effects like _darkness_ and _nausea_, and allowing the user to _see invisible entities_.
item.clockware.leg.hydrothruster.tooltip: Double-tap _jump_ while underwater to unleash a _whirlwind_ _boost_.
Equips the user with _bubble_ _thrusters_ that boost _swimming speed_.
item.clockware.leg.jet_ankle.tooltip.sum: Increases _jump height_ and _step elevation_ for smoother mobility.
item.clockware.leg.kinetic_actuator.tool: Enhances the user's thighs with mechanical equipment, increasing user's _movement_ _speed_.
item.clockware.leg.shock_absorber.toolti: Converts _reduced_ fall damage into a _shockwave_ upon landing.
Protects the user from _impact_ through heavy metal reinforcements on the _feet_, _reducing_ _fall_ _damage_.
